hero.css: .hero_001 { --saffron:#f0a33a; --marigold:#f7c35f; --rose:#b94a4d; --ruby:#751b2d; --wine:#341022; --indigo:#151632; --cream:#fff4dc; --gold:#d8a84f; position:relative; min-height:100svh; overflow:hidden; isolation:isolate; padding:clamp(28px,4vw,58px); color:var(--cream); font-family:Manrope, sans-serif; background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% 22%, rgba(247,195,95,.34) 0 15%, transparent 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 18%, rgba(185,74,77,.32) 0 14%, transparent 34%), linear-gradient(135deg, #150f2d 0%, #321026 42%, #6f172d 72%, #281229 100%); } .hero_001::before { content:""; position:absolute; inset:0; z-index:-2; background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,244,220,.06) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(255,244,220,.045) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size:72px 72px; mask-image:radial-gradient(circle at 55% 35%, black, transparent 78%); } .hero_001::after { content:""; position:absolute; inset:auto -10% -45% -10%; height:68%; z-index:-1; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(240,163,58,.28), transparent 68%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo { position:absolute; border-radius:999px; filter:blur(3px); pointer-events:none; } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo--one { width:520px; height:520px; left:-190px; top:14%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(216,168,79,.18), transparent 66%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo--two { width:420px; height:420px; right:-120px; top:-80px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,244,220,.13), transparent 67%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { position:absolute; top:0; left:50%; width:min(920px,92vw); transform:translateX(-50%); display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(15, 1fr); gap:6px; z-index:3; pointer-events:none; } .hero_001 .hero_001__strand { height:clamp(50px,6vw,82px); position:relative; } .hero_001 .hero_001__strand::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:50%; width:1px; height:72%; background:linear-gradient(var(--gold), transparent); } .hero_001 .hero_001__strand::after { content:""; position:absolute; left:50%; bottom:0; width:clamp(13px,1.6vw,21px); height:clamp(13px,1.6vw,21px); transform:translateX(-50%); border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%, #ffe6a0 0 18%, var(--marigold) 19% 55%, #d27022 56% 100%); box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(247,195,95,.5); } .hero_001 .hero_001__strand:nth-child(even) { height:clamp(34px,4vw,58px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { min-height:calc(100svh - clamp(56px,8vw,116px)); display:grid; grid-template-columns:minmax(0, 1.02fr) minmax(360px, .98fr); align-items:center; gap:clamp(28px,5vw,76px); max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto; position:relative; z-index:2; } .hero_001 .hero_001__copy { max-width:720px; padding-top:36px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:9px 14px; border:1px solid rgba(255,244,220,.24); border-radius:999px; background:rgba(255,244,220,.08); box-shadow:0 18px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.18); backdrop-filter:blur(16px); color:#ffe6aa; font-size:12px; line-height:1; letter-spacing:.18em; text-transform:uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dot { width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--marigold); box-shadow:0 0 18px var(--marigold); } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { margin:clamp(24px,3.4vw,44px) 0 0; font-family:"Playfair Display", "Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-weight:600; font-size:clamp(68px,10vw,156px); line-height:.82; letter-spacing:-.065em; color:#fff6e5; text-shadow:0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.38); } .hero_001 .hero_001__title span { display:block; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title em { display:block; margin:.03em 0 .08em .06em; font-family:"Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-size:.42em; font-weight:400; font-style:italic; letter-spacing:0; color:var(--marigold); } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { margin:clamp(22px,2.4vw,34px) 0 0; max-width:650px; color:rgba(255,244,220,.88); font-size:clamp(16px,1.35vw,20px); line-height:1.75; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { margin-top:clamp(26px,3vw,42px); display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, minmax(0,1fr)); gap:12px; max-width:720px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__detail { min-height:98px; padding:17px 18px; border:1px solid rgba(255,244,220,.2); border-radius:24px; background:linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,244,220,.13), rgba(255,244,220,.045)); box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.18); backdrop-filter:blur(18px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__label { display:block; margin-bottom:9px; color:#ffd98e; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.18em; text-transform:uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__value { display:block; color:#fff8ee; font-family:"Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-size:clamp(20px,1.7vw,27px); line-height:1.04; font-weight:600; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height:650px; position:relative; display:grid; place-items:center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace { position:relative; width:min(520px, 100%); aspect-ratio: .78; border-radius:44px 44px 130px 130px; background:linear-gradient(150deg, rgba(255,244,220,.17), rgba(255,244,220,.05)); border:1px solid rgba(255,244,220,.22); box-shadow:0 38px 110px rgba(0,0,0,.36), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.16); backdrop-filter:blur(20px); overflow:hidden; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace::before { content:""; position:absolute; inset:20px; border-radius:34px 34px 116px 116px; border:1px solid rgba(247,195,95,.32); background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 29%, rgba(247,195,95,.16), transparent 35%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace::after { content:""; position:absolute; left:8%; right:8%; bottom:9%; height:44%; border-radius:50% 50% 0 0 / 72% 72% 0 0; border:2px solid rgba(255,226,160,.46); border-bottom:0; box-shadow:inset 0 26px 70px rgba(18,11,31,.42); } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome { position:absolute; left:50%; top:8%; width:46%; aspect-ratio:1.2; transform:translateX(-50%); border-radius:52% 52% 10px 10px; background:linear-gradient(180deg, #ffe0a2, #b86d2e); clip-path:polygon(50% 0, 58% 13%, 78% 24%, 89% 46%, 89% 100%, 11% 100%, 11% 46%, 22% 24%, 42% 13%); box-shadow:0 14px 42px rgba(216,168,79,.28); } .hero_001 .hero_001__spire { position:absolute; left:50%; top:2%; width:2px; height:50px; transform:translateX(-50%); background:linear-gradient(#fff4dc, var(--gold)); } .hero_001 .hero_001__spire::before { content:""; position:absolute; left:50%; top:-7px; width:12px; height:12px; transform:translateX(-50%); border-radius:50%; background:#ffe6aa; box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,230,170,.85); } .hero_001 .hero_001__arches { position:absolute; left:9%; right:9%; bottom:17%; display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:14px; height:40%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arch { border:1px solid rgba(255,244,220,.24); border-bottom:0; border-radius:80px 80px 0 0; background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(21,16,45,.22), rgba(21,16,45,.62)); box-shadow:inset 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.18); } .hero_001 .hero_001__mandala { position:absolute; width:360px; height:360px; right:-44px; top:46px; border-radius:50%; opacity:.72; background:repeating-conic-gradient(from 8deg, rgba(255,226,160,.58) 0 5deg, transparent 5deg 11deg), radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 34%, rgba(255,244,220,.12) 35% 36%, transparent 37% 48%, rgba(247,195,95,.14) 49% 50%, transparent 51%); mask-image:radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 21%, black 22% 100%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal { position:absolute; left:-22px; bottom:70px; width:172px; height:172px; border-radius:50%; display:grid; place-items:center; text-align:center; background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 25%, #fff0c4, #e6a648 40%, #8e2b2f 100%); color:#351020; box-shadow:0 28px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.34); border:1px solid rgba(255,244,220,.55); } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal-inner { width:132px; height:132px; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid rgba(53,16,32,.28); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__month { font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.25em; font-weight:800; } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { font-family:"Playfair Display", serif; font-size:56px; line-height:.9; font-weight:700; } .hero_001 .hero_001__year { font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.22em; font-weight:800; } .hero_001 .hero_001__ribbon { position:absolute; right:12px; bottom:34px; padding:13px 18px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(18,11,31,.58); border:1px solid rgba(255,244,220,.22); color:#ffe6aa; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.16em; text-transform:uppercase; backdrop-filter:blur(14px); box-shadow:0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.25); } .hero_001 .hero_001__diya { position:absolute; width:92px; height:52px; border-radius:0 0 70px 70px; background:linear-gradient(180deg, #d78332, #7c2630); box-shadow:0 20px 46px rgba(0,0,0,.25); } .hero_001 .hero_001__diya::before { content:""; position:absolute; left:50%; top:-38px; width:24px; height:42px; transform:translateX(-50%); border-radius:60% 40% 55% 45%; background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 70%, #fff9d7 0 10%, #ffd36d 28%, #ee832f 58%, transparent 70%); filter:drop-shadow(0 0 16px rgba(255,211,109,.78)); } .hero_001 .hero_001__diya::after { content:""; position:absolute; inset:8px 18px auto; height:10px; border-radius:50%; background:rgba(255,244,220,.22); } .hero_001 .hero_001__diya--left { left:3%; bottom:18%; transform:rotate(-6deg); } .hero_001 .hero_001__diya--right { right:1%; top:28%; transform:scale(.78) rotate(8deg); } .hero_001 .hero_001__floor { position:absolute; left:50%; bottom:0; width:min(760px, 92vw); height:160px; transform:translateX(-50%); border-radius:50% 50% 0 0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(247,195,95,.18), transparent 68%); } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001 { padding:32px 22px 42px; min-height:auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { min-height:auto; grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:28px; padding-top:48px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__copy { max-width:100%; text-align:center; margin:0 auto; padding-top:20px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { margin:0 auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height:560px; width:100%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace { width:min(470px, 92vw); } .hero_001 .hero_001__mandala { right:2%; top:32px; width:280px; height:280px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal { left:calc(50% - 245px); bottom:54px; width:148px; height:148px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal-inner { width:114px; height:114px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { font-size:48px; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001 { padding:24px 16px 32px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { width:112vw; gap:2px; opacity:.9; } .hero_001 .hero_001__strand:nth-child(n+12) { display:none; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { padding-top:44px; gap:20px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { max-width:100%; white-space:normal; justify-content:center; line-height:1.4; letter-spacing:.12em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { font-size:clamp(62px,18vw,92px); letter-spacing:-.055em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { font-size:15px; line-height:1.68; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:10px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__detail { min-height:auto; padding:15px 16px; border-radius:20px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height:455px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace { width:100%; border-radius:32px 32px 96px 96px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arches { gap:8px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__mandala { width:210px; height:210px; right:-58px; top:24px; opacity:.52; } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal { left:8px; bottom:34px; width:116px; height:116px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__seal-inner { width:90px; height:90px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__month, .hero_001 .hero_001__year { font-size:10px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__day { font-size:38px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__ribbon { right:8px; bottom:22px; padding:10px 12px; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.12em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__diya { width:70px; height:40px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__diya--right { display:none; } }
hero.designNotes: A festive royal-palace hero with deep jewel tones, marigold toran, diya accents, mandala texture, and a glassmorphic palace illustration to honor the Gujarati wedding message while keeping the layout modern and luxurious.
hero.html:
Shri Ganesh BlessingsWedding Celebration

Kavya&Mihir

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

DateMarch 22, 2026
VenueAkshar Grand Palace
LocationSomerset, New Jersey
MAR222026
Dinner • Music • Love
